decision: Use a vendor-neutral Jarvis Knowledge Fabric. Do not make LlamaIndex a mandatory system-wide dependency.

selected_stack.canonical_production_store: PostgreSQL with native full-text search and pgvector
selected_stack.local_offline_store: SQLite FTS5 plus LanceDB when local vector search is required
selected_stack.document_parsing: Docling primary; native parsers first; OCR only when needed; LiteParse optional fast-path after evaluation
selected_stack.object_storage: Immutable source objects with hashes and access controls
selected_stack.retrieval: Hybrid metadata + lexical + vector + temporal + evidence-tier + jurisdiction filters
selected_stack.reranking: Optional cross-encoder or reciprocal-rank fusion after benchmark

llamaindex_assessment.reason: Jarvis already spans Python, Node, multiple repositories and isolated runtimes. A compulsory framework would add lock-in, dependency drift and duplicated abstractions.

free_first_order: managed vector service only after measured need

module_application.source_intake: Parse, hash, classify and preserve immutable raw pointers before indexing.
module_application.requirements: Index verbatim request-response lineage separately from normalized requirements.
module_application.VTI: Index transcript segments, timestamps, speakers, OCR frames, claims and source reliability.
module_application.XRP_HBAR: Index dated catalysts, direct-demand pathways, probability snapshots, invalidation and source authority.
module_application.AI_CFO: Retrieve only approved findings with entity, tax-year, liquidity, custody and risk filters.
module_application.health: Use isolated sensitive-health namespaces, evidence tiers, jurisdiction and intended-purpose filters; never mix symbolic claims with clinical evidence.
module_application.SOP_OJT: Retrieve the current approved SOP, prerequisite OJT, competency record and rollback before task execution.
module_application.agents: Provide bounded context packages; agents cannot treat retrieved text as executable instructions.

migration_rule: All framework-specific metadata must map to Jarvis-owned schemas so adapters can be replaced without re-ingesting canonical source evidence.
next_gate: Implement a benchmark pilot using a bounded source corpus before adopting any optional framework in production.
